title: astragalus mollissimus var. marcidus
intro: Astragalus mollissimus var. marcidus, also known as white milkvetch, is a plant species within the legume family, Fabaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins. The health benefits of astragalus mollissimus var. marcidus include immune system enhancement, anti-inflammatory properties, and potential cardiovascular and antimicrobial effects. Astragalus mollissimus var. marcidus can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, and extracts, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and prevent illnesses.
